name: writing-loop
description: An autonomous short-drama (竖屏短剧) writers' room in a folder. Nine agents (Showrunner, Story-Designer, Episode-Writer, Reviewer, Script-Doctor, Evaluator, Market-Watch, Reflect, Sweep) plan, outline, write, review, score, and market-watch vertical micro-drama scripts through ticket state on a local board. North-star story bible + outline + per-arc beat cards + foreshadow/story-state/production ledgers keep 60-100 episode serials coherent; a 4-dimension/16-indicator rubric gates milestones (outline, first-paywall pack, finale). Two intake modes: novel adaptation (拆书) or original creation. Operator skill: add-script.
